barRaise.topFinding: The render lane resolved in practice this cycle: world_3d.gd grew from a spike to a full gameplay scene (economy, placement, units, nav, save) and the picker launches only 3D, with the dual 2D enemy path collapsing into a single pooled enemy_field_3d. But the GDD still names 2D as the spec (doc no longer describes the shipping artifact), the day shipped 24 commits across 9 version strings (v0.95.8 committed eleven times), and the dashboard-writer HIGH is unfixed for a second cycle, nulling the barRaise block on each of those releases. Highest-leverage move stays the self-contained write-dashboard-status.ps1 fix; second is recording the 3D decision in the GDD so doc matches code.
